case_title: UNION TERRACE VS. LINDA CAHILL ET AL

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER UNION TERRACE'S MOTION FOR FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED AS TO RESPONDENT LINDA CAHILL AND DENIED AS TO RESPONDENT JAMES HORIO. UNION TERRACE IS ENTITLED TO FEES AND COSTS OF $25,127.82 AGAINST MS. CAHILL PER THE BYLAWS, WHICH ARE INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE IN THE LEASE SIGNED BY THE PARTIES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion In Support Of Petitioner Union Terrances Motion For Fees And Costs
Off Calendar May-31-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. DAVID L. JORDAN OF GORDON & REES LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-875-3323 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER UNION TERRACE'S Motion For Fees And Costs is granted as to respondent Linda Cahill and denied as to respondent James Horio. Union Terrace is entitled to fees and costs of $25,127.82 against Ms. Cahill per the bylaws, which are incorporated by reference in the lease signed by the parties. Union Terrace was the prevailing party in the arbitration and all the fess and costs sought by Union Terrace were reasonably incurred. There is no contract signed by Mr. Horio which provides for an award of fees and costs to Union Terrace. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.

Notice Of Petition And Petition For Confirmation Of Arbitration Decision
Off Calendar Mar-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ERIC A. ORTIZ, ESQ. of Gordon & Rees, Tel No. 415-986-5900 appearing for the Petitioner;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER UNION TERRACE'S Petition For Confirmation Of Arbitration Decision is granted. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/HK)
